title: Range
description: Specifies a contiguous range of text.

segmentId.description: The ID of the header, footer, or footnote that this range is contained in. An empty segment ID signifies the document body.

startIndex.description: The zero-based start index of this range, in UTF-16 code units.

endIndex.description: The zero-based end index of this range, exclusive, in UTF-16 code units.

tabId.description: The tab that contains this range.
